apps.name: Noir
apps.subtitle: Modular media player
apps.localizedDescription: Noir modular media player with external services.
apps.versionDescription: Fix Miruro and headered HLS: keep stream proxy alive for full in-app playback (stop when player closes); remove premature proxy shutdown timers. Miruro module: send proper Origin (scheme+host only) for CDN requests.

versions.localizedDescription: Fix Miruro and headered HLS: keep stream proxy alive for full in-app playback (stop when player closes); remove premature proxy shutdown timers. Miruro module: send proper Origin (scheme+host only) for CDN requests.
